creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 187879
svn diff for biology/hmmer

Nice work, looks clean.

Would you like to adopt the hmmer port?  I'm maintaining too many right now (53 committed, hundreds more under development) and can't keep up with updates.

I'd also like to invite you to join freebsd-ports-wip, so we can collaborate on development of biology ports:

https://github.com/outpaddling/freebsd-ports-wip
